packageRules.description: Keep package.json and the lockfile in sync by raising the declared range when a new in-range version is released, and updating the lockfile in the same PR. Example: `"react": "^18.2.0"` locked at 18.2.5 becomes `"react": "^18.2.6"` with the lockfile at 18.2.6 — humans reading package.json see the actual minimum tested version, and downstream consumers of our published packages (@kognic/*, @annotell/*) resolve from the same floor. Renovate runs `npm/pnpm/yarn install` (or `bun install`) after the manifest edit, so bump covers what update-lockfile would have done.
